title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 534.180 - Depositions may be taken
text:
534.180.  Depositions may be taken. — Depositions may be taken to be read on trial of any such cause in the same manner as in causes before circuit judges.
(RSMo 1939 § 2857, A.L. 1945 p. 1089, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2471; 1919 § 3019; 1909 § 7681 
Effective 1-02-79
